description: Use this API to replicate the OPF data contained in the working case in the form of an Optimal Power Flow Data File. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = rwop(sid, all, status, out, ofile)
python_syntax: ierr = rwop(sid, all, status, out, ofile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid bus subsystem id from 0 to 11. a bus subsystem must have been previously defined. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: all
parameters.description: All buses or specified buses subsystem flag. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: An array of four elements specifying Specifies whether to use various control options. A value of 0 means the option is not enabled. A value of 1 means the option is enabled. (input).

out.description: direct output to a data file specified by OFILE.
direct output to the current report device.

error_codes.description: invalid SID value or subsystem SID is not defined.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
